spec.name: The Cave T-Cross
spec.description: You are standing in a mudlike substance. The smell here is awful, it is rotten. To the west you can see some light.

east.description: To the east the tunnel still goes downwards.

west.description: You can see some light to the west.

extra_descs.description: When you examine the mud, you notice small worms crawling around.
The worms are purple. They do not look edible.
